## Checklist

- [ ] This PR targets **`develop`** (PRs to `stg`/`main` are maintainer-only release steps)
- [ ] I branched from the latest `develop`
- [ ] Tested locally with `npm start`
- [ ] If I touched UI strings: updated **both** `locales/pt.json` and `locales/en.json` (CI checks parity)
- [ ] Code matches the style around it (vanilla JS, no new frameworks/dependencies without discussion)
